{{Quote|He ain't putting no Borgs in our mound!|A humanoid bigot|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 7">[[Star Wars (1977) 7|''Star Wars'' (1977) 7]]</ref>}}
'''Spacers' Hill''', also spelt '''Spacer's Hill''', was a cemetery mound for [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] just outside of [[Tun Aduban]] on [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]]. It was maintained by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] priest [[Pera]]. Any [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] was considered to have the right to be buried on the Hill.

==History==
Pera spent a good portion of his time gathering dead bodies from barfights and shootouts around town so that they could be buried properly, a duty that was much appreciated by the spacers in the community.

However, Pera once attempted to bury a [[Unidentified Cyborg (Aduba-3)|cyborg]] body in the hill, only to find himself being lynched on the streets. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who had landed the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] on [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]] to lie low for a while, broke up the scuffle and helped Pera bring the body to its final resting place.

By tradition, any valuables found upon the body of a dead pilot belonged to the person who buried the body.
